  • Summary Report
  • Design Hierarchy
  • Clock Domains
  • Reset Domains
  • Clock Domain Crossings (CDC)
  • Reset Domain Crossings (RDC)
  • Finite State Machines (FSM)
  • Combinational Loops
spacefibrelight
  • – Scenario
  • View page source

library IEEE; use IEEE.STD_LOGIC_1164.ALL;

entity tb_fifo_dc_custom_to_axis is end tb_fifo_dc_custom_to_axis;

architecture Behavioral of tb_fifo_dc_custom_to_axis is

component FIFO_DC_AXIS_M is generic ( – Users to add parameters here G_DWIDTH : integer := 36; – Data bus fifo length G_AWIDTH : integer := 10; – Address bus fifo length G_THRESHOLD_HIGH : integer := 2**10; – high threshold G_THRESHOLD_LOW : integer := 0 ; – low threshold – User parameters ends M_AXIS_TDATA_WIDTH : integer := 32; M_AXIS_TUSER_WIDTH : integer := 4 ); port ( – Users to add ports here aresetn : in std_logic; WR_CLK : in std_logic; – Clock WR_DATA : in std_logic_vector(G_DWIDTH-1 downto 0); – Data write bus WR_DATA_EN : in std_logic; – Write command – STATUS FIFO CMD_FLUSH : in std_logic; – fifo flush STATUS_BUSY_FLUSH : out std_logic; – fifo is flushing STATUS_THRESHOLD_HIGH : out std_logic; – threshold high reached flag (sur WR_CLK) STATUS_THRESHOLD_LOW : out std_logic; – threshold low reached flag (sur RD_CLK) STATUS_FULL : out std_logic; – full fifo flag (sur WR_CLK) STATUS_EMPTY : out std_logic; – empty fifo flag (sur RD_CLK) STATUS_LEVEL_WR : out std_logic_vector(G_AWIDTH-1 downto 0); – Niveau de remplissage de la FIFO (sur WR_CLK) STATUS_LEVEL_RD : out std_logic_vector(G_AWIDTH-1 downto 0) ; – Niveau de remplissage de la FIFO (sur RD_CLK) – User ports ends – Do not modify the ports beyond this line – Ports of Axi Master Bus Interface M00_AXIS M_AXIS_ACLK : in std_logic; M_AXIS_TVALID : out std_logic; M_AXIS_TDATA : out std_logic_vector(M_AXIS_TDATA_WIDTH-1 downto 0); M_AXIS_TLAST : out std_logic; M_AXIS_TREADY : in std_logic; M_AXIS_TUSER : out std_logic_vector(M_AXIS_TUSER_WIDTH-1 downto 0)

);

end component FIFO_DC_AXIS_M;

signal rst_n : std_logic := ‘0’; signal m_ready_rd : std_logic := ‘0’; signal CLK : std_logic := ‘0’; signal s_wr_data : std_logic_vector(35 downto 00) := (others =>’0’); signal s_wr_data_en : std_logic := ‘0’;

constant periode : time := 6.667 ns; constant C_AWIDTH : integer := 10; constant C_DWIDTH : integer := 36; constant C_M_AXIS_TDATA_WIDTH : integer := 32; constant C_M_AXIS_TUSER_WIDTH : integer := 4;

begin

FIFO_DC_AXIS_M_inst: FIFO_DC_AXIS_M generic map( G_DWIDTH => C_DWIDTH,
G_AWIDTH => C_AWIDTH,
G_THRESHOLD_HIGH => 2**C_AWIDTH,
G_THRESHOLD_LOW => 0, M_AXIS_TDATA_WIDTH => C_M_AXIS_TDATA_WIDTH, M_AXIS_TUSER_WIDTH => C_M_AXIS_TUSER_WIDTH ) port map( aresetn => rst_n, WR_CLK => CLK, WR_DATA => s_wr_data, WR_DATA_EN => s_wr_data_en, CMD_FLUSH => ‘0’,
STATUS_BUSY_FLUSH => open,
STATUS_THRESHOLD_HIGH=> open, STATUS_THRESHOLD_LOW => open,
STATUS_FULL => open,
STATUS_EMPTY => open,
STATUS_LEVEL_WR => open,
STATUS_LEVEL_RD => open,
M_AXIS_ACLK => CLK, M_AXIS_TVALID => open,
M_AXIS_TDATA => open,
M_AXIS_TUSER => open,
M_AXIS_TLAST => open,
M_AXIS_TREADY => m_ready_rd );

horloge : process begin CLK <= not CLK; wait for periode/2; end process;

– Scenario

scenario : process begin rst_n <= ‘0’; wait for 1 us; wait until rising_edge(CLK); rst_n <= ‘1’; wait for 1 us; m_ready_rd <= ‘1’;
wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK);

– Trame 1 s_wr_data <= x”1” & x”22222222”; s_wr_data_en <= ‘1’; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”3” & x”44444444”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”5” & x”66666666”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”7” & x”88888888”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”9” & x”AAAAAAAA”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”B” & x”CCCCCCCC”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”D” & x”EEEEEEEE”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data_en <= ‘0’;

– Trame 2 wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data_en <= ‘1’;
s_wr_data <= x”1” & x”22222222”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”3” & x”44444444”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”5” & x”66666666”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”7” & x”88888888”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”9” & x”AAAAAAAA”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”B” & x”CCCCCCCC”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”D” & x”EEEEEEEE”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”1” & x”22222222”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”3” & x”44444444”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”5” & x”66666666”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”7” & x”88888888”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”9” & x”AAAAAAAA”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”B” & x”CCCCCCCC”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”D” & x”EEEEEEEE”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data_en <= ‘0’;
wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK);

– Trame 3 arrive alors que ready ? 0 s_wr_data_en <= ‘1’;
s_wr_data <= x”1” & x”22222222”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”3” & x”44444444”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”5” & x”66666666”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”7” & x”88888888”; m_ready_rd <= ‘0’; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”9” & x”AAAAAAAA”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”B” & x”CCCCCCCC”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”D” & x”EEEEEEEE”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data_en <= ‘0’;
m_ready_rd <= ‘1’; wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK);

– Trame 4 : ready passe ? 0 en m?me temps que rd_data_vld ? 1 s_wr_data_en <= ‘1’;
s_wr_data <= x”1” & x”22222222”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”3” & x”44444444”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”5” & x”66666666”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”7” & x”88888888”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”9” & x”AAAAAAAA”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”B” & x”CCCCCCCC”; m_ready_rd <= ‘0’; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”D” & x”EEEEEEEE”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data_en <= ‘0’;
m_ready_rd <= ‘1’;

wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK);

– Trame 5 : ready passe ? 0 un cycle apr?s rd_valid ? 1 s_wr_data_en <= ‘1’;
s_wr_data <= x”1” & x”22222222”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”3” & x”44444444”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”5” & x”66666666”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”7” & x”88888888”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”9” & x”AAAAAAAA”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”B” & x”CCCCCCCC”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”D” & x”EEEEEEEE”; m_ready_rd <= ‘0’; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data_en <= ‘0’; wait until rising_edge(CLK); m_ready_rd <= ‘1’;

– Trame 6 : ready passe ? 0 deux cycle apr?s rd_valid ? 1 s_wr_data_en <= ‘1’;
s_wr_data <= x”1” & x”22222222”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”3” & x”44444444”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”5” & x”66666666”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”7” & x”88888888”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”9” & x”AAAAAAAA”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”B” & x”CCCCCCCC”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”D” & x”EEEEEEEE”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data_en <= ‘0’;
m_ready_rd <= ‘0’;
wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); m_ready_rd <= ‘1’;

-- Trame 7 : ready passe ? 0 en m?me temps que rd_data_valid (fin de trame)

s_wr_data_en <= ‘1’;
s_wr_data <= x”1” & x”22222222”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”3” & x”44444444”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”5” & x”66666666”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”7” & x”88888888”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”9” & x”AAAAAAAA”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”B” & x”CCCCCCCC”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data <= x”D” & x”EEEEEEEE”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data_en <= ‘0’;

wait until rising_edge(CLK); wait until rising_edge(CLK); m_ready_rd <= ‘1’;

s_wr_data <= x”1” & x”22222222”; wait until rising_edge(CLK); s_wr_data_en <= ‘0’;

wait;
end process;

end Behavioral;
